character_state_overlays.evidence_quote: 沈念歌坐在床边，手里握着一根验孕棒。...验孕棒上——两条红线。很深，很清晰。她的眼泪掉下来。
character_state_overlays.body_state: emotional distress with tears, holding pregnancy test stick
character_state_overlays.visible_constraints: close-up on face showing tears, hand holding stick

shots.keyframe_moment: 沈念歌坐在床边，手里握着一根验孕棒，眼泪掉下来
shots.reasoning_brief: Visual-only shot establishing pregnancy confirmation; overlay for visible emotional and early pregnancy state based on test result.

character_state_overlays.evidence_quote: 沈念歌盯着那条消息看了很久。然后，她把手机翻过去，屏幕朝下扣在桌上。
character_state_overlays.body_state: seated, staring at phone, early pregnancy implied from prior

shots.keyframe_moment: 沈念歌盯着手机消息，把手机扣在桌上
shots.reasoning_brief: Visual-only with phone interaction; pregnancy state carries from prior shot without new visual change.

prop_handoffs.source_evidence: line 35: 她拿起验孕棒，看了最后一眼，然后扔进了垃圾桶。

character_state_overlays.evidence_quote: 她站起来，走到窗边。...她把手放在小腹上。...她的眼神从脆弱变成了某种坚硬的东西。

shots.keyframe_moment: 沈念歌把手放在小腹上，眼神坚硬

narration_lines.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
narration_lines.exact_text: 我不知道你是谁的。但你是我的。
narration_lines.performance: 画外音，声音平静得可怕

shots.reasoning_brief: Includes voiceover as narration; prop handoff from prior; state shows resolve post-pregnancy confirmation.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 予予……妈妈给你取的名字，知予。知道的知，给予的予。妈妈知道的一切，都想给你。

character_state_overlays.evidence_quote: 沈念歌的肚子已经很大了，她一个人撑着腰走出门...没有家属签字，没有陪产。产房里只有她一个人。
character_state_overlays.body_state: large belly pre-birth transitioning to holding newborn, weak posture
negative_constraints: no visible large belly in holding moment

character_state_overlays.evidence_quote: 她低头看着怀里的婴儿——皱巴巴的小脸，闭着眼睛，小拳头攥得紧紧的。
character_state_overlays.body_state: wrinkled skin, closed eyes, clenched fists

shots.keyframe_moment: 沈念歌低头看着怀里的婴儿
shots.reasoning_brief: Post-birth scene; overlays for postpartum and newborn states; local location specified.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_NURSE
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 沈小姐！你产后还没恢复，不能出院——而且孩子的出生登记——父亲那一栏你空着，需要补充——

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 父亲不详。

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_NURSE
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 可是——

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我说了。不详。

character_state_overlays.evidence_quote: 沈小姐！你产后还没恢复，不能出院
character_state_overlays.body_state: recently postpartum, holding child while walking

character_state_overlays.evidence_quote: 婴儿哭了一声。

shots.keyframe_moment: 护士追出，沈念歌抱着孩子走
shots.location_evidence: nearby_context line 53: 妇幼保健院门口。
shots.reasoning_brief: Dialogue exchange; nurse as listener; postpartum state visible in action.

character_state_overlays.evidence_quote: 她抱着孩子，走进了小城的巷子里。...她走得很慢，但每一步都很稳。
character_state_overlays.body_state: slow steady walk holding child, thin silhouette

shots.keyframe_moment: 沈念歌抱着孩子走进巷子，阳光照背影
shots.location_evidence: line 77: 她抱着孩子，走进了小城的巷子里。
shots.reasoning_brief: Visual departure; fatigue from postpartum evident in slow pace.

character_state_overlays.evidence_quote: 沈念歌一手抱着哭闹的予予
深夜，一间出租屋。沈念歌一手抱着哭闹的予予，一手在电脑上打字做兼职翻译。...时钟指向凌晨三点。
character_state_overlays.body_state: fatigued from late-night work and childcare

shots.keyframe_moment: 深夜出租屋，沈念歌抱着哭闹的予予打字
shots.reasoning_brief: Montage picture one; child age overlay for infant; mother exhaustion from context.

character_state_overlays.evidence_quote: 予予坐在她旁边的婴儿车里，手里抓着一个塑料玩具，咿咿呀呀地笑。
character_state_overlays.body_state: young toddler in stroller, playing and babbling

character_state_overlays.evidence_quote: 清晨，菜市场。沈念歌蹲在菜摊前挑最便宜的蔬菜。

shots.keyframe_moment: 清晨菜市场，沈念歌蹲挑菜，予予在婴儿车笑
shots.reasoning_brief: Montage pictures three and four start; local locations; child age as toddler.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 祝你生日快乐……祝你生日快乐……

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 不能碰，会烫。

character_state_overlays.evidence_quote: 予予一岁生日。
沈念歌愣了一下——然后眼泪就掉进了蛋糕里。

shots.keyframe_moment: 沈念歌唱生日歌，眼泪掉进蛋糕
shots.reasoning_brief: Birthday scene in montage; child age overlay; emotional visible state.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪，那个房子好大！我们以后能住那么大的房子吗？

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 能。予予长大了什么都会有。

character_state_overlays.evidence_quote: 予予两岁半。他比同龄孩子高一头，说话也更早。
negative_constraints: avoid global child lock if conflicting

shots.keyframe_moment: 公交车内，予予指窗外大楼
shots.location_evidence: line 109: 沈念歌带他坐公交车，
shots.reasoning_brief: Bus scene; child age overlay with taller description; local location.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我爸爸……在很远的地方。但我觉得他会来找我。

character_state_overlays.evidence_quote: 予予三岁。幼儿园面试。
沈念歌站在教室门口，听到这句话，指甲掐进了掌心。

shots.keyframe_moment: 幼儿园面试，予予回答，沈念歌在门口掐掌
music_cues: 钢琴渐起，温柔中带着心酸
shots.reasoning_brief: Kindergarten scene; music cue; pain visible in hand action; teacher implied listener.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 予予。

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 嗯？

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪要带你回滨海市。

shots.keyframe_moment: 予予画画，沈念歌看手机关掉深吸气
shots.reasoning_brief: Return to present; dialogue to child; phone as prop but no handoff.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 滨海市？就是那个有大高楼的城市？

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 嗯。那边有个很好的医生，能帮予予把心脏上的小蝴蝶修好。

shots.keyframe_moment: 予予抬头问，沈念歌回答

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪，滨海市……是不是我爸爸在的地方？

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: ……我不知道。

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我觉得是。我有预感。

character_state_overlays.evidence_quote: 沈念歌的手指收紧了。

shots.keyframe_moment: 予予看画问，沈念歌手指收紧
沈念歌看着儿子侧脸，闭眼睁眼决然

narration_lines.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
narration_lines.exact_text: 四年了。我以为这辈子都不会再回到那个城市。可是予予需要最好的医生。而最好的医生……在滨海市。

character_state_overlays.evidence_quote: 她站起来，开始收拾行李。行李很少——两个箱子，一箱是予予的衣服和药，一箱是她仅有的几件衣服。

shots.keyframe_moment: 沈念歌收拾行李，予予跑来掏画
shots.reasoning_brief: Preparation visual; minimal items show hardship.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪你看！这是我们一家三口！中间这个黑色的是爸爸，因为我还没见过他！等见到了我就涂成肉色！

prop_handoffs.source_evidence: line 171: 沈念歌接过那张画。

shots.reasoning_brief: Drawing handoff from prior; child to mother.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 好。等找到了，你涂成最漂亮的颜色。

character_state_overlays.evidence_quote: 她的嘴唇抖了抖，但没让眼泪掉下来。

shots.keyframe_moment: 沈念歌蹲抱予予，嘴唇抖
music_cues: 弦乐轻起，从心酸转为温柔，但暗流涌动
shots.reasoning_brief: Closing hug; music cue; suppressed emotion visible.
